name: Sreekar Rachakonda
tagline: I build scalable, cloud-ready web applications end-to-end.
availability: Actively seeking full-time software engineering roles starting May 2025

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science

certifications.name: AWS Certified Developer – Associate
certifications.description: Application development, deployment, and debugging on AWS

certifications.name: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
certifications.description: Cloud fundamentals, deployment strategies, and AWS services

cloudAndTools: AWS (S3, CloudFront, Lambda, API Gateway, SQS, DynamoDB, Bedrock, SAM, ACM, IAM)

achievements: Working with SEEBURGER BIS landscape in an ERP environment for EDI integration and data exchange.
Developing and maintaining EDI mappings and business process configurations for enterprise clients.
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless electronic data interchange across systems.
Designed, developed, and maintained software applications based on client and business requirements.
Developed and maintained APIs, web services, and database interactions for scalable and secure applications.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams including analysts, designers, and testers to ensure high-quality delivery.
Utilized Agile/Scrum methodologies for sprint planning, task management, and continuous improvement.
Performed unit and integration testing to ensure functionality, performance, and reliability.
Created and sustained 6 software applications with an 85% average bug-free code deployment rate.
Designed and implemented a payment page using JavaScript Payment SDK and integrated it with SQL database for transaction tracking.
Built real-time delivery tracking system using JavaScript, WebSockets, and SQL to deliver live updates and enhance customer experience.
Implemented features using Python, JavaScript, and SQL with relational data management via primary keys.
Collaborated with product, design, and QA teams to deliver projects on time.

projects.name: Serverless Order Processing System
projects.description: Event-driven backend on AWS using Lambda, API Gateway, SQS, and DynamoDB. Features queue-based async processing, Dead Letter Queues, SAM infrastructure as code, and CI/CD with GitHub Actions.

projects.name: Portfolio on AWS Cloud
projects.description: Deployed a static portfolio website using S3 as origin and CloudFront CDN for global delivery. Configured ACM for SSL certificates, GitHub Actions CI/CD for automated deployments, and secure IAM access with DNS routing.

projects.name: Bank and Institute App
projects.description: Salesforce-based application managing operations and data for banks and educational institutes using interconnected SQL tables. Emphasized data modeling, integration, and platform customization.

projects.name: Drones in Agriculture
projects.description: Led backend programming and flight control implementation with JavaScript dashboard for real-time telemetry. Trained a basic ML model for decision-making in agricultural drone operations.

projects.name: Student Database System
projects.description: Web application in Python to manage student academic data with dashboard UI and SQL database integration. Streamlined data management for educational institutions.

projects.name: Progressive Web Chat App
projects.description: Secure chat application with encryption, WhatsApp-style interface, and PWA principles for cross-platform usability. Built with Python focusing on security and user experience.

about: Aspiring AWS and Cloud Developer with hands-on experience in enterprise ERP environments. Currently working as an EDI Developer at Zentech Consulting, specializing in system integration and data exchange using SEEBURGER BIS within ERP landscapes. Holds a Master's in Computer Science from UAB and an AWS Developer Associate certification. Experienced in building serverless architectures using Lambda, API Gateway, SQS, and DynamoDB, and deploying production workloads with S3, CloudFront, and CI/CD pipelines. Combines ERP integration expertise with modern cloud engineering skills to design scalable, event-driven systems on AWS.
